summary: Kang Hyunwoo, known as Alley Boss, accepts a daunting 1-on-13 team battle against the powerful Black Skull Guild. Despite being severely outnumbered, Alley Boss systematically defeats high-ranking members like Vice Guildmaster Park Cheolgu and the Seogang-Seowon duo, using a combination of superior skill and psychological warfare to break his opponents' morale. As his guild members surrender, the Black Skull Guildmaster reflects on their guild's corrupt path, ultimately accepting defeat and vowing to rebuild their guild from scratch. Alley Boss emerges victorious, becoming known as an embodiment of justice, though his actions also attract the attention of other powerful guilds like the New World Guild.
key_moments: Kang Hyunwoo (Alley Boss) accepts a 1-on-13 team battle against the Black Skull Guild.
Alley Boss quickly and skillfully defeats multiple high-ranking Black Skull Guild members, causing widespread demoralization and forcing surrenders.
Kang Hyunwoo wins the duel, solidifying his reputation and drawing the attention of other powerful guilds.
characters_present: Park Cheolgu (Black Skull Guild Vice Guildmaster)
Kang Jung-Gu (New World Guild acting captain)
